description: 1inch Network Fusion Atomic Swaps fork to Hardhat 3.

reset files & cache.command: git checkout -- test/libraries/FeeCalcLib.t.sol test/integration/ResolverMock.t.sol contracts/BaseEscrow.sol && forge clean

edit & compile Solidity test with min de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/libraries/FeeCalcLib.t.sol && forge build

edit & compile Solidity test with max de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/integration/ResolverMock.t.sol && forge build

edit & compile Solidity contract: contra.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> contracts/BaseEscrow.sol && forge build
